DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MARC R. STIMPERT, Esq. of Lunski & Stimpert LLP (Tel: 415-426-3586) for Plaintiff Sagarika Chalasani;
Atty. PAUL W. THORNDAL, Esq. of List Jacobson-Kwok Thorndal, LLP (Tel: 510-302-6600) for Defendant Vamsi Akkineni.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT VAMSI AKKINENI'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's demurrer to the first amended complaint is sustained in its entirety without leave to amend. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
